tips_en: Start with PlanBench-XL (Paper 3) — its findings on agent collapse under tool failure and the strong correlation between exploration breadth and accuracy (r=0.902) offer the most actionable insights for LLM agent research. Then read EnterpriseClawBench (Paper 1) as a complementary benchmark focused on enterprise workflows; both papers expose a shared gap: current agents lack robust adaptive re-planning in realistic, failure-prone environments. KaLM-Reranker-V1 (Paper 2) is tangentially related through its focus on efficient retrieval, which underpins the tool-retrieval mechanisms evaluated in PlanBench-XL.
tips_zh: 建议优先阅读 PlanBench-XL（论文3）——其关于智能体在工具失效下表现崩溃、以及探索广度与准确率高度相关（r=0.902）的发现，对 LLM 智能体研究具有最强的可借鉴价值。接着阅读 EnterpriseClawBench（论文1）作为企业工作流方向互补的基准；两篇论文共同揭示了一个共性缺口：当前智能体在真实且易出故障的环境中缺乏鲁棒的自适应重规划能力。KaLM-Reranker-V1（论文2）通过高效检索与 PlanBench-XL 所评估的工具检索机制存在间接关联，可作为延伸阅读。
